title: Knowledge State
description: Tracks a knowledge transfer event with tetravalent logic integration for assessing comprehension

id.description: Unique identifier for this knowledge state (e.g., ks-governance-recon-tier2-for-tars-agent)

concept.description: What is being taught — the knowledge proposition

layer.description: Which knowledge layer: governance (universal), experiential (ecosystem-wide learnings), domain (repo-specific)

domain_context.description: Optional — which repo/domain this applies to. Required when layer is 'domain'.

pdca_cycle.description: Reference to a PDCA cycle ID if experiential knowledge

five_whys.description: Reference to a 5 Whys analysis if root cause finding

source.description: Where the knowledge came from — at least one source must be provided

type.description: Whether the learner is a human or an agent

identifier.description: Persona name for agents, role description for humans

delivery_mode.description: How knowledge was delivered: narrative (for humans), structured (for agents)

behavioral_verification.description: Whether the learner demonstrated the knowledge in practice

attempts.description: Number of teaching attempts (max 3 before escalation)

outcome.description: Final outcome of the knowledge transfer
